title: helictotrichon convolutum
intro: Helictotrichon convolutum, also known as the convoluted oat grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, where it grows in well-drained, alkaline soils. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helictotrichon convolutum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
